Dwarf.description: Brave, stalwart folk as sturdy as the stone kingdoms they carve inside mountains.
Dwarf.name: Dwarf

Elf.description: Ethereal, graceful people who revere knowledge and beauty. Elves see far and live long.
Elf.name: Elf

Goblin.description: Green, clever beings who thrive in dark, cramped places. As fierce as they are tiny.
Goblin.name: Goblin

Half-Orc.description: Towering, tusked warriors who are as daring as humans and as relentless as orcs.
Half-Orc.name: Half-Orc

Halfling.description: Small, cheerful country folk with mischievous streaks. They enjoy life’s simple pleasures.
Halfling.name: Halfling

Human.description: Bold, adaptable, and diverse people who learn quickly and accomplish mighty deeds.
Human.name: Human

Kobold.description: Tiny, humanoid dog-lizards with a penchant for tinkering, trap building, and a hint of magic.
Kobold.name: Kobold
